name: JMicron Technology Corp.
summary: JMicron Technology Corp. operates as an IC design company in Taiwan and internationally. The company designs high-speed data and signal interfaces, such as 3.1 5Gbps, USB 3.2 10Gbps and USB 3.2 20Gbps to connect them to SATA/PCIe/UFS; PCIe interface to SATA interface; and SATA 1.5Gbps/SATA 3Gbps/SATA 6Gbps, and SATA port multiplier/port selector, as well as bridge controllers for SATA to PATA interface. It also provides external data storage products, such as single bay controllers for USB 2.0/USB 3.0/USB 3.1/USB 3.2 host interfaces; dual-/multi-bay bridge controllers for external multiple-bay HDDs, RAID, and SATA port multipliers and port selectors; storage device controllers; and universal flash storage products. In addition, the company offers hard disk drive duplicators and surveillance storage systems, and NAS devices with RAID functionality. JMicron Technology Corp. is based in Hsinchu City, Taiwan.
